revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Umigami Shrine
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v9.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Umigami Shrine | native_name = 海神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Umigami Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Umigami Shrine'''|海神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|WD=Q135022918}}
== described by source (P1343) ==
* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|WD=Q135037878}}
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Amano Shrine|WD=Q135040693}}
== street address (P6375) ==
* {'text': '兵庫県豊岡市気比', 'language': 'ja'}
[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Successor]]
{{wikidata link|Q135070072}}

revision.comment: Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V10 - add qualifier sub-bullets to property claims)

revision.comment: Remove street address (P6375) section heading
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_from_oseno.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Umigami Shrine | native_name = 海神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Umigami Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Umigami Shrine'''|海神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|lt=Shikinai Successor|WD=Q135022918}}
== described by source (P1343) ==

{{nihongo|'''Umigami Shrine'''|海神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|lt=Shikinai Successor|WD=Q135022918|1=Shikinai Successor}}
